# Reporter acknowledgment template

(Maintainer pastes the following into the GHSA advisory after fix is shipped.)

---

We thank **{REPORTER_NAME}** for the responsible disclosure of this vulnerability.

- **Advisory**: GHSA-{ID}
- **CVE**: {CVE-ID or "not assigned"}
- **Severity**: {Critical|High|Medium|Low}
- **Affected versions**: {v1.0.0 ... v1.x.y}
- **Fixed in**: {v1.x.y+1}
- **Disclosure timeline**:
  - Reported privately: {YYYY-MM-DD}
  - Acknowledged: {YYYY-MM-DD}
  - Fix released: {YYYY-MM-DD}
  - Public disclosure: {YYYY-MM-DD} (90-day countdown from report)

Acknowledgment in CHANGELOG.md v{x.y.z}.

---
